# solutions-ui desktop release trigger

Desktop release CI resolves and builds the latest `Ardor-Cerebrum/solutions-ui`
`main` branch when a desktop release is created.

For UI-only changes that need fresh desktop packages, update this file on
`ardor-desktop` with a conventional commit such as:

```text
ci: trigger desktop release for solutions-ui
```

Last trigger: 2026-07-09
